title: GORGO: Online Tuning for Cross-Region Network-Aware LLM Serving
innovation_summary: GORGO: Online Tuning for Cross-Region Network-Aware LLM Serving: We present GORGO, a proxy architecture that holistically factors network latency, prefill cost, and queueing delay using tunable parameters.
